message:
🐛 Fix Import/Install validation failing on card listings (#1591)

The handleImport function was re-parsing the raw file content and
validating it, but console-kb files use a nested format
({ mission: { steps } }) that doesn't match the flat MissionExport
schema. Now validates the properly merged resolvedMission instead,
which has title, type, tags, and steps all correctly populated from
both the index metadata and the fetched file content.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
